message:
test(fuzz): add seed corpus for fuzz_webhook_delivery_status_parse

Initial corpus checked in alongside the existing
webhook_delivery_status_parse fuzz target so libfuzzer has a
non-empty starting set to mutate from. Following the project
convention used by other fuzz_<name>/ corpora under fuzz/corpus/.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
